skill.name: maxart-creative-studio
skill.description: Create MaxArt-ready image and video prompt packs from product briefs, campaign ideas, or reference images.
skill.summary: Build prompt packs, shot lists, variations, and production notes for MaxArt creative work.
skill.author: jerrylearner187

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported weak cryptography, system reconnaissance, network URLs, and command execution indicators. Review found the cryptography, reconnaissance, and command findings are false positives from ordinary prompt prose and Markdown formatting. The only remaining concern is benign external links to MaxArt.ai and AI Dreamhub, with no executable network code found.

low_findings.title: Benign External Documentation Links
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URLs are a README badge link and the declared MaxArt primary site. They do not perform runtime network requests or transmit user data.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both URLs appear in documentation text only. No executable code, fetch call, webhook, or data transfer path was found.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Static Matches Are False Positives
low_findings.description: The flagged lines contain prompt-writing guidance and examples, not cryptographic APIs or hashing logic. No weak cryptographic algorithm use was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed lines are natural language prompt instructions. There are no imports, functions, commands, or cryptographic primitives in the skill files.

low_findings.title: Reconnaissance And Command Static Matches Are False Positives
low_findings.description: The reconnaissance matches are generic creative workflow phrases. The command execution match is a Markdown code-formatted reference path, not shell execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged text is documentation for creative prompt construction. The backticks at SKILL.md line 91 wrap a file path and do not invoke Ruby, shell, or any executable command.

content.value_statement: Creative teams often lose time turning rough ideas into consistent image and video prompts. This skill converts briefs and references into structured MaxArt prompt packs with variations, constraints, and production notes.
actual_capabilities: Turns product briefs into structured MaxArt image prompt sets.
Creates image-to-video motion directions with camera and pacing notes.
Builds campaign prompt packs for hero assets, social creatives, and channel variants.
Adds negative constraints for common image generation failure modes.
Suggests prompt variations for testing style, lighting, framing, and environments.
Provides reference-image guidance for preserving identity, logos, product shape, and layout.
limitations: Does not render images or videos inside MaxArt.ai.
Does not guarantee exact visual results from a generation model.
Does not provide undocumented MaxArt controls or private platform features.
Needs clear brand, audience, format, and reference details for best results.

use_cases.title: Launch Product Visuals
use_cases.description: Create hero image prompts, background options, and negative constraints for a new ecommerce product launch.

use_cases.title: Plan Social Video Concepts
use_cases.description: Turn a short campaign idea into motion concepts, shot lists, pacing notes, and end-frame directions.

use_cases.title: Transform Reference Assets
use_cases.description: Convert an existing image into style transformation prompts while preserving identity, composition, or product geometry.

prompt_templates.title: Create A Product Prompt Pack
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a basic product image set.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a MaxArt prompt pack for this product: [product]. Audience: [audience]. Style: [style]. Format: [aspect ratio]. Include core prompts, variations, negative constraints, and testing notes.

prompt_templates.title: Build A Social Ad Set
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for paid social creative options.
prompt_templates.prompt: Turn this campaign brief into MaxArt-ready social ad prompts: [brief]. Include a visual direction, three ad concepts, channel adaptations, CTA ideas, and variation prompts for testing.

prompt_templates.title: Direct Image-To-Video Motion
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request using a reference image as a keyframe.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create image-to-video motion directions for this reference: [describe image]. Preserve [fixed elements]. Change [allowed changes]. Include camera movement, subject motion, secondary motion, pacing, and ending frame.

prompt_templates.title: Design A Multi-Asset Campaign System
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for a reusable creative system.
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a MaxArt campaign prompt system for [brand or offer]. Deliver a master visual system, hero asset prompts, supporting asset prompts, short-form video concepts, per-channel adaptations, and a testing matrix.

output_examples.input: A skincare brand needs premium launch visuals for a hydrating serum.
output: Creative direction focused on clean clinical luxury, soft reflections, and clear product geometry.
Three hero prompts for studio, lifestyle, and high-contrast ad versions.
Negative constraints for warped bottle shape, unreadable label text, cluttered backgrounds, and muddy highlights.
Testing note to vary lighting before changing product angle.

output_examples.input: A creator wants a still portrait turned into a short cinematic video.
output: Motion concept with a slow push-in, subtle hair movement, background light movement, and controlled pacing.
Ending frame direction that keeps the face recognizable and centered.
Two alternate motion directions for a calmer edit and a more energetic social cut.

output_examples.input: A SaaS team needs fast ad creative angles for a design tool.
output: Master visual system for clean workspaces, polished screens, and conversion-focused composition.
Variants that change environment, camera distance, and color system one at a time.
Caption and CTA suggestions aligned with the product benefit.

best_practices: Provide audience, offer, platform, aspect ratio, and brand constraints before asking for prompts.
Keep fixed elements explicit when using reference images.
Test one or two prompt dimensions at a time for clearer creative learning.
anti_patterns: Asking for a vague style without subject, setting, lighting, or composition details.
Mixing too many conflicting modifiers into one prompt.
Expecting generated text, logos, or fine product geometry to be perfect without post-production.

faq.question: Does this skill generate images or videos?
faq.answer: No. It creates prompt packs and creative directions intended for use in MaxArt.ai.

faq.question: Can it work from a reference image?
faq.answer: Yes. Describe the reference image and state which elements must stay fixed or may change.

faq.question: What formats can it plan for?
faq.answer: It can plan still images, image transformations, text-to-video concepts, image-to-video directions, and campaign packs.

faq.question: Can it create marketing copy?
faq.answer: It can suggest hooks, captions, and CTAs when the request is marketing-oriented.

faq.question: Does it know every MaxArt feature?
faq.answer: No. It avoids promising exact controls or undocumented platform features.

faq.question: What input improves the output?
faq.answer: Clear goals, audience details, aspect ratio, visual style, brand constraints, and known failure points improve the prompt pack.
